title: stylophorum napaulense
intro: Stylophorum napaulense, also known as Himalayan celandine or Napaul stemless celandine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. Stylophorum napaulense has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's various parts have been reported to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and exhibiting hepatoprotective effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots, leaves, and stems are often used to create infusions, decoctions, and powdered extracts, which are utilized to treat various health conditions.
